{{Item
| image = Leather jacket.png
| id = leather_jacket
| type = Customization
| Subtype = Non_dyeable
| stackable = 64
}}

'''Leather Jacket''' is a non-dyable equipable item that makes your dog look rad. B)

[[File:Leather jacket display.png|frameless|606x606px]]
== Obtaining ==
=== Crafting ===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Ingredients
! Recipe
|-
| Leather <br>+ Wool
| [[File:Leather jacket crafting.png]]
|}
== Usage ==
{{Accessory_use}}
== Trivia ==
It was added in the original Doggy Talents.
